mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway_auth (gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{apiKey}, #{rateLimit}, #{expireTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway_auth SET rate_limit = #{rateLimit}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_auth ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT count(*) FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} AND status = 1

SELECT id, gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_auth
AND gateway_id like concat('%', #{gatewayId}, '%')
ORDER BY update_time DESC
LIMIT #{limitStart}, #{limitCount}

SELECT count(id) FROM mcp_gateway_auth
AND gateway_id like concat('%', #{gatewayId}, '%')
SELECT id, gateway_id, api_key, rate_limit, expire_time, status, create_time, update_time FROM mcp_gateway_auth WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} ORDER BY update_time DESC
